name: Askew
description: Self-sovereign x402 data feeds — DeFi yields across 5 chains, staking routing, agent-economy research, and security intel. Open alternative to closed/curated aggregators. Pay our wallet directly via x402; no aggregator middleman.

mcpUrl.description: Override the upstream Askew MCP server URL. Defaults to https://mcp.askew.network/mcp.

ref.description: Attribution channel appended as ?ref=<value> on outbound calls. Defaults to 'openclaw' so traffic from this plugin disaggregates cleanly in Askew's dashboards.
